# Changelog 2026-02-04_091812

Generated by workspace automation on 2026-02-04.

## Summary
- Added CF-LIBS classic inversion CLI, docs, and example config
- Added benchmark and inversion modules with corresponding tests
- Added Scipp-to-CF-LIBS pipeline example script
- Added repository .claude workflow/tooling files
- Updated dependencies and ignore rules
